features: ADORABLE FROG DESIGN: Cute cartoon frog shape makes bath time more enjoyable and engaging for babies, boys and girls, transforming routine bathing into a fun experience.
SUPERIOR WATER ABSORPTION: High-quality sponge material efficiently soaks up water and creates rich lather for thorough and gentle cleansing of delicate skin.
GENEROUS SIZE: Measures 23 x 15.5 x 3.2 cm, providing ample surface area for comfortable grip and effective washing of your child's body.
SOFT AND GENTLE: Specially designed bathing sponge with gentle texture that is perfect for babies' sensitive skin whilst providing effective cleaning.
VERSATILE BATH ACCESSORY: Ideal shower sponge for body washing, suitable for daily bathing routines for children of all ages, making it a practical addition to bath time essentials.
description: Transform bath time into a delightful adventure with the Freddy Frog Bath Sponge, designed to make bathing more enjoyable for boys and girls alike. This charming cartoon frog-shaped sponge captures children's attention with its playful design, turning routine washing into an engaging and fun experience. Measuring 23 x 15.5 x 3.2 cm, this bath sponge is perfectly sized for little hands whilst providing ample surface area for effective cleansing. The high-quality sponge material features excellent water absorption properties, efficiently soaking up water to create a rich lather whilst thoroughly cleansing delicate skin. Its soft texture is gentle enough for young children's sensitive skin, making it ideal for daily use during bath time. The adorable frog character design not only entertains but also encourages children to develop positive bathing habits. Whether you're looking to make bath time less of a struggle or simply want to add a touch of whimsy to your child's routine, this cartoon bathing sponge delivers both functionality and fun in one delightful package.
